headline: Why Rockwell Automation (ROK) Is Up 8.6% After Raising 2026 Guidance On Strong Q2 Results
summary: In its fiscal second quarter ended March 31, 2026, Rockwell Automation reported sales of US$2,239 million and net income of US$350 million, both higher than a year earlier, and raised its full-year revenue and earnings guidance after beating analyst expectations. The quarter also featured double-digit growth in orders and strong performance from intelligent devices and software, reinforcing management’s focus on higher-margin automation and digital solutions across sectors such as data...
